original_text:
### Layout Principles
- Generous white space; clean, never cluttered. **Limit focal points per section** — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.
- "Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.
- Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern) — alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge. **[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.**
- Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern (per patient brochure, which is the **reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials**).

relations.note: Imagery and icons support clean, focused sections when used to break up text.
The canonical content pattern can be supported by the show-don't-tell imagery principle.
Background sequencing supports visual separation between otherwise clean, focused sections.

quotes: Generous white space; clean, never cluttered. **Limit focal points per section** — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.

rules.intent: Preserve clarity and direct audience attention.
rules.rule_text: Keep sections generously spaced, clean, and never cluttered. Limit each section to one focal point, using contrast to direct attention to its single most important element.

quotes: "Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.

rules.intent: Make content more visually engaging and digestible.
rules.rule_text: Apply the “Show, don't tell” principle: break up text walls with imagery and icons.

quotes: Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern) — alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge.
**[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.

rules.intent: Maintain topical separation and enable safe section sequencing during assembly.
rules.rule_text: Use color blocks to delineate topics: alternate White (#ffffff), Light Blue (#e6f0f9), Golden Sand (#fef1c8), and gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections do not visually merge. Section designers must declare each section’s background color in component metadata so assemblers can avoid two identical adjacent backgrounds.

quotes: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern

Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern (per patient brochure, which is the **reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials**).

rules.intent: Create a consistent, patient-centered visual and messaging pattern.
rules.rule_text: Use a bold headline, simple benefit statements, and a patient quote as the canonical content-block pattern. The patient brochure is the reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone across all LISRAYA materials.
